title: [ExportVerilog] Incorrect verilog output for bitcast + zero width aggregate types

features.name: zero-width packed array in struct member
features.description: Code should include a struct with a packed array member that has zero width (logic [0:0])
features.snippet: struct packed { logic [0:0] zero; logic c; } b;

features.name: zero-width array type assignment
features.description: Code should include a zero-width array type declaration and its assignment operation

features.name: bitcast between types with zero-width aggregates
features.description: Code should include a type conversion or cast operation involving structs with zero-width array members
